skills.name: React 19 use() Hook — Promises and Context
skills.description: use() unwraps Promises and Context values inside render. Suspends automatically for async data, replaces useContext in certain patterns.

skills.name: useActionState — Form Actions with State
skills.description: useActionState (replaces useFormState) manages form action state including pending, errors, and return values. Works with Server Actions.

skills.name: useOptimistic — Instant UI Updates
skills.description: useOptimistic applies optimistic UI state during async operations and automatically reverts to actual state when the operation completes.

skills.name: useTransition for Non-Blocking Mutations
skills.description: Wrap async mutations in startTransition to keep the UI responsive during Server Action calls. Replaces manual isPending state.

skills.name: React Compiler — Auto-Memoization
skills.description: React Compiler (RC) automatically memoizes components and values. Removes need for useMemo/useCallback in most cases. Requires Rules of React compliance.

skills.name: React Server Components Mental Model
skills.description: RSC renders on the server, has zero client JS. Push data fetching to the deepest component that needs it. Never pass server-only data through Client Components.
